basics.name: Myroslav Kiurchev
basics.summary:
I am a polyglot software engineer with a passion for solving complex problems and a deep grasp of the mechanics behind them. Throughout my career, I have worked across various domains, taking on roles from a regular engineer to a team's technical lead.

As an engineer, my experience spans from high-load distributed systems to low-level programming. Beyond software, I have a passion for electronics and embedded development, with a solid understanding of hardware system design, communication protocols, and navigation principles, informed by both hands-on practice and a background in military telecommunications.

I am business-oriented and prefer a comprehensive approach to problem-solving: from analyzing the problem to delivering the solution. I pay significant attention to developer experience, supporting my teammates' growth and maintaining high productivity across the team.

work.name: Web Legends
work.summary: Web Legends is a custom software development company specializing in insurance and healthcare domains, pioneering AI-powered automation solutions for real-world processes. As a Staff Engineer, I was responsible for technical leadership, architecture decisions, infrastructure, and hands-on development across multiple teams, as well as mentoring engineers.
highlights: Pioneered and led the company's first fully AI-driven software development process, setting a new benchmark for development efficiency
Established an AI-driven workflow that became a reference model subsequently adopted across other projects in the company
Identified and surfaced process inefficiencies across teams, providing technical recommendations for improvement

work.name: Edenlab
work.summary: Edenlab is a custom software and product development company specializing in healthcare and financial domains. I joined the company as a frontend developer on a project for the Ukrainian healthcare system reform but eventually introduced a full-stack development approach to my team. Together, we established a cross-functional software development process in the company, which we then successfully applied to numerous subsequent projects.
highlights: Introduced full-stack development approach and grown first cross-functional team in the company
Built and maintained development and deployment infrastructure with primary focus on high developer experience and efficiency
Mentored my teammates and developed a diverse group of developers with varying skill levels into a balanced, self-reliant team
Became a versatile specialist who assists with complex and unconventional problems

work.name: Freelance contractor
work.summary: As a freelance programmer, I specialized in both front-end and back-end development, working with various clients on a contract basis. My portfolio included: frontend for cloud storage service (using Knockout.js), React Native and web applications with a shared UI codebase, the design of numerous complex user interfaces tailored for specific customer needs, and the development of several websites using Ruby on Rails.

work.name: TwinSlash
work.summary: TwinSlash is a custom software development company focused on Ruby on Rails web projects. I joined the company as the sole front-end developer and was responsible for implementing user interfaces across all of the company's projects.

education.institution: National Technical University of Ukraine “Kyiv Polytechnic Institute”
Military Institute of Telecommunications and Information Technology

projects.name: Turbota (private beta)
projects.description: Health wallet / health tracker mobile app. As a technical lead for a project I was responsible for system design and implementation of core system components. We managed to grow a self-sufficient cross-functional team, and I really enjoyed being part of this process. Also, I was involved in building and maintenance of development and deployment infrastructure which was successfully reused in subsequent projects.

projects.name: Government medical information system (NDA)
projects.description: Implementation of a national healthcare system component. I was a technical lead on a project to develop an insurance coverage / eligibility check facade application for a FHIR server. The main challenge was to design a UI and business processes to be configurable, aiming to create a universal solution that could be reconfigured and potentially adopted in other countries in the future.

projects.name: Mobile banking platform for Raiffeisen Bank International
projects.description: Digital banking platform project for a major bank in the European market. I have developed an MVP mobile application as part of a scalable digital banking platform. The app's features included: user registration, user identity proofing, opening a bank account and credit scoring.

projects.name: eHealth
projects.description: Central component of the Ukrainian national health system. I joined the project as a front-end developer, focusing on the system's internal user interfaces. Eventually, I transitioned to a full-stack developer role, where I participated in developing APIs and the UI for the system's main administrative console and implemented several business processes for the system's backend.
